message:
feat(runtime): enhance builder, worker scheduling, and sleep futures

Major improvements to runtime subsystem focusing on configurability
and worker coordination.

## Runtime Builder (+336 lines)
- Add fluent builder API for runtime configuration
- Support for custom thread naming and affinity
- Add worker count auto-detection based on CPU topology
- Configurable task queue sizes and backpressure policies
- Add graceful shutdown timeout configuration

## Worker Scheduler (+49 lines)
- Improve work-stealing algorithm efficiency
- Add worker health monitoring with heartbeats
- Better load distribution across worker threads
- Add metrics hooks for observability

## Runtime State (+25 lines)
- Track additional runtime lifecycle events
- Add shutdown coordination primitives
- Improve state transition error handling

## Sleep Futures (+67 lines)
- Optimize timer coalescing for reduced wakeups
- Add deadline adjustment for drift compensation
- Better integration with hierarchical timing wheel

## Lab Runtime (+3 lines)
- Minor integration fixes for experimental features

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-zs64","title":"[EPIC-INFRA] Bead Harmonization - API & Agent Interface Coherence","description":"# [EPIC-INFRA] Bead Harmonization - API & Agent Interface Coherence

## Purpose
Master epic tracking bead harmonization: merge duplicates, standardize naming, fix priorities, migrate orphan sub-tasks. NO FEATURE LOSS.

## Sub-Tasks
1. bd-q0om: Merge I/O EPICs (90l9 → ds8)
2. bd-hzrb: Merge Parallel Runtime EPICs (n5o → xrc)
3. bd-kh65: Standardize EPIC naming convention
4. bd-4rpn: Fix priority alignments
5. bd-3p6e: Migrate orphan sub-tasks to hierarchical IDs

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All duplicate EPICs merged or closed with migration notes
- [ ] All EPICs follow [EPIC-{category}] naming convention
- [ ] Priority follows dependency order (parents ≤ children)
- [ ] All sub-tasks use hierarchical IDs ({epic}.{n}.{m})
- [ ] No cycles in dependency graph (verified via `bv --robot-insights | jq '.Cycles'`)
- [ ] `bv --robot-triage` returns healthy project metrics

## Verification Commands
```bash
bv --robot-triage | jq '.quick_ref'
bv --robot-insights | jq '.Cycles'
br list --status=closed | grep "DUPLICATE\|MIGRATED"
```

## Logging Strategy
- All changes logged in docs/bead-harmonization-migration.md
- Each bead update includes reason in description
- Git commit messages reference bead IDs","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:27:46.833876766Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:50.988353887Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:13.406855498Z","close_reason":"All harmonization sub-tasks closed; naming/priority alignment verified; orphans migrated; no dependency cycles","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":13,"issue_id":"bd-zs64","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Checked sub-tasks: bd-q0om/bd-hzrb/bd-kh65/bd-4rpn/bd-3p6e all closed. Verified xrc/n5o hierarchy, epic naming consistent, priorities aligned (per bd-4rpn close_reason), and br dep cycles empty.","created_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:07Z"},{"id":14,"issue_id":"bd-zs64","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Ran bv --robot-insights | jq '.Cycles' => null (no cycles). Orphan migration (bd-3p6e) verified and logged in docs/bead-harmonization-migration.md.","created_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:50Z"}]}
